name: Security hardening report
about: Track non-sensitive security hardening tasks and controls
title: "[Security]: "
labels: "area:security,security-hardening"
assignees: ""
---

## Security Context

Describe the threat model or security objective.

## Current Risk

What weakness exists today? Avoid posting sensitive exploit details.

## Proposed Mitigation

Describe the control, guardrail, or architecture hardening plan.

## Validation Plan

How will we prove the mitigation works?

## Compliance or Audit Notes

Reference standards or policy requirements if applicable.

## Priority and Phase

- Priority: `priority:P0` / `priority:P1` / `priority:P2`
- Phase: `phase:1` / `phase:2` / `phase:3`

## Responsible Disclosure

If this is a real vulnerability with exploitation details, do not file it publicly.
Please follow [SECURITY.md](../../SECURITY.md).
